title: Principal Instructional Designer at SSC Tube

jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at SSC Tube
jsonLd.description:
SSC Tube invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SSC Tube:
SSC Tube is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SSC Tube!
